import.title: Bring your setup with you
import.description: Goose can bring over existing settings and tools it finds before you start chatting.
import.scanning: Looking for existing Goose settings and Claude Desktop tools...
import.scanFailed: Could not scan for existing setup.
import.emptyDescription: You can still configure a provider and start fresh.

provider.title: Choose a default
provider.description: Pick what Goose should use for new chats. Most people should choose an AI model service like ChatGPT, Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, or Ollama.
provider.readyDescription: Choose the default way Goose should start new chats. You can change this any time.
provider.noneReady: No usable provider is ready yet.
provider.noModels: This provider is configured, but no models are available yet.

tour.title: Ready to go
tour.description: Goose is ready. Here is what is available now.
tour.readyWithModel: Goose will start with {{model}}. You can switch models from Home whenever you need.

summary.defaultDescription: This is what Goose will use when you start a new chat.
summary.extensionsDescription: Goose can use connected tools in chats when needed. Manage imported tools from Extensions.
summary.skillsDescription: Personal skills Goose can see now. Project skills appear when you open a project.
